events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes misreading mark colors (red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm) which is a pure ID item. This is a non-compliance issue with 811/CGA best practices for locates and marking. Misreading utility mark colors is a safety hazard that could lead to striking the wrong utility.

Decision: fail (non-compliant, dangerous)
Risk: high (misreading utility colors could lead to striking a utility)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: non-compliant
Percent complete: ~80 (rough-complete)
Confidence: high
